title: Cluck
description: Makes all mobs look like chickens
body: ## Support Me ![Youtube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17d4ca87909921fd4a897b652282fc1382b6a33b.png) ![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bee352562b9baf12d465b3ffe6d7535cad7e753c.png) ![Twitter/X](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4e66b2b5b4df295e42bb2ed98b024c6005efe19.png) ## Information this is a simple, vanilla-like fabric mod for 1.21/1.21.1. it makes all mobs look like chickens and changes their hitbox sizes, making for an interesting and cursed challenge. the mod was made for [this video](https://youtu.be/C1-MsJse2HM). ## Public Usage if you'd like to use assets/modified versions of this mod in your own projects and publicly share them, credit me and link this page or my YouTube video. - **as long as you credit me,** you may use this mod or assets from this mod in your own public social media posts, mod packs, resource packs, and bedrock ports - **please do not** create new showcase webpages, download links, or claim credit for making this mod or assets from this mod. - **if you are unsure,** message me on discord (L33tfox) for permission
